description_long: This is a medium-sized frog with a robust, muscular body and long, powerful hind legs adapted for jumping. Its skin is predominantly olive green with yellow and dark brown mottling, providing excellent camouflage in leafy environments. The underbelly is lighter, almost white, with a granular texture, while the limbs are slender and end in webbed toes. The eyes are large, round, and positioned on the sides of the head, giving it a wide field of vision. The frog's skin appears moist and slightly bumpy, typical of many amphibians. Its overall appearance suggests it is well-suited for both terrestrial and aquatic habitats.
description: A mottled olive green and yellow frog with long hind legs, webbed toes, and large side-facing eyes. Its moist, bumpy skin and muscular build indicate a strong jumper adapted for both land and water.
description_view_0: Side view showing the frog's elongated body, muscular hind legs, and mottled coloration.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide-set eyes, broad head, and outstretched forelimbs.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the curve of the back and the webbing on the hind feet.
description_view_3: Head-on view emphasizing the symmetry of the face, nostrils, and the spread of the limbs.
